intent_movement: Describe the movement the UI must make visible, not the result it should sell.

left.purpose: Show current plane, direction, freshness and accepted surface.
Show current tensions, intensities, filters and alerts.

right.purpose: Explain how the current state was reached.
Answer from selected domain state and runtime context.

<sidebar-key>.title: Domain-native tooltip title
<sidebar-key>.body: What this UI count means in the domain.
<sidebar-key>.logic: How the operator should interpret it without contaminating the domain.

common_modules.reason: Every Lab needs current field awareness.
Every Lab must show what does not hold.
The operator must see how the cycle moved, not just what it produced.

domain_modules.blocks: What contamination or false inference this module prevents.

admin_actions.boundary: Run from current seed/context. Do not override direction unless explicitly reviewed.
Requires reviewed source, hypothesis, falsifier and domain contract.

forbidden_labels: Replace with labels that would contaminate this domain before review.

e2e.expectation: A completed cycle updates data consumed by at least one left, one center and one right module.
The UI can show tools called, skipped steps, suspensions and accepted surface.
